name: faster-whisper (CTranslate2 Whisper)
applicability: 4x faster than OpenAI Whisper with same accuracy. CTranslate2 backend. GPU + CPU support. large-v3 model. This is THE local transcription engine for T27. Used with beam_size=10 and vad_filter=True for quality.

name: pytubefix (YouTube download)
applicability: Same library as bedrock repo. Used here for both single video and Playlist download. Audio-only stream extraction. Cross-repo validation: two independent repos chose pytubefix.
home_connection: T27 — YouTube content extraction (validated by 2nd repo using same lib)

name: compromise.js (client-side NLP)
applicability: Lightweight client-side NLP for sentence/paragraph detection in transcript reader HTML. 11K+ stars. Could be useful for any browser-based text processing in SoNash frontend.
home_connection: SoNash frontend — potential client-side NLP for journal entry processing

name: OpenAI Whisper API
applicability: Cloud fallback for when local GPU unavailable. whisper-1 model. $0.006/min. Less accurate than local large-v3 per README. Shows the cost/accuracy tradeoff.
home_connection: T27 — cloud fallback option with known cost

name: SpaCy sentence splitting
applicability: en_core_web_sm for transcript sentence splitting. Auto-downloads model if missing. Alternative to regex splitting. Both approaches shown in code for comparison.

name: README Whisper model configuration section
applicability: Practical guidance on model selection, CUDA setup, compute types, beam_size tuning, VAD filter. Operational knowledge not found in Whisper docs.

name: Transcript reader HTML (compromise.js + reader mode)
applicability: Self-contained HTML reader with dark mode, font controls, text width slider. Uses compromise.js for client-side paragraph detection. Pattern for transcript presentation.
